body:
I think it is pretty useful to be able to index into a coordinate without needing to build a grid first to do some preliminary check (for example, what is the surface layer height? Or the bottom layer?)

This PR introduces indexing for `CallableCoordinate`s so they can be used and inspected as arrays.
This PR was motivated by this change https://github.com/PRONTOLab/GB-25/pull/234/commits/e745054d887d4f5c2d7bb7697a38219db9000a83 which demonstrates that it would be nice to be able to index coordinates.
title: Indexing for a `CallableCoordinate`

body:
This PR regularizes auxiliary boundary conditions in the FieldBoundaryCondition constructor. It was made feasible by support for location-based regularization. I believe this provides a simpler solution to the annoying warning that #3961 tries to solve.

cc @simone-silvestri, @bgroenks96
title: Regularize auxiliary boundary conditions
